hero.title: Abdel Rahman Al-Obadah
hero.subtitle: Web Development · JavaScript · UI/UX · SEO · Leadership · Flutter
hero.bio: Web Developer with 4+ years of experience specializing in JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and modern digital experiences. Built 30+ websites, led teams of 15, reached 20,000+ monthly users, and achieved 4th place nationally in Jordan's Himmah civic tech competition.

about.text: A passionate web developer with 4+ years of experience specializing in JavaScript, HTML, CSS, UI/UX, Flutter, and modern digital experiences. Contributed to multiple real-world projects focused on building user-friendly interfaces and scalable solutions. Built 30+ websites through freelance work and currently pursuing a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science at Jordan University of Science and Technology — GPA 3.7. Combines academic knowledge with practical experience to deliver impactful digital products. Based between Abu Dhabi, UAE and Irbid, Jordan.

highlights.aboutSecondary: Combines academic knowledge with practical experience to deliver impactful digital products. Based between Abu Dhabi, UAE and Irbid, Jordan.

exp1.title: Freelance Web Developer
exp1.desc: Building websites and digital products for clients. Specializing in front-end development, UI/UX, Firebase integration, and SEO optimization. Remote from Amman, Jordan.

exp2.title: Social Media Team Member
exp2.desc: Creating engaging technical content, appearing in educational videos, proposing creative ideas, and organizing & volunteering in technical events.

exp3.title: Web Developer & Video Editor
exp3.desc: Developed over 30 websites using HTML, JavaScript, and CSS — enhancing user experience and functionality. Collaborated with clients as a video editor, delivering high-quality content for four distinct projects. Based in Abu Dhabi, UAE (Remote).

exp4.title: Team Leader — Educational Blogging
exp4.desc: Led a team of 15 student contributors across multiple educational blogs serving school students in the UAE. Managed content strategy, editorial planning, SEO, and analytics. Reached approximately 20,000 monthly visitors consistently over 8+ years. Based in Dubai, UAE (Remote).

proj1.title: Himmah — National Civic App
proj1.desc: Civic technology platform built for a national competition organized by the Independent Elections Commission, Jordanian Parliament & the Crown Prince Foundation. Achieved 4th place nationally in Jordan.

proj2.title: 8th Grade UAE
proj2.desc: Educational blog supporting middle school students in the UAE. Founded and led as Project Lead. Managed 15 student contributors, attracting ~20,000 monthly visitors over 8+ years. Applied SEO best practices and analytics tracking.

proj3.title: DT Robot Club
proj3.desc: Educational STEM blog for school students focused on robotics and technology. Founded as Project Lead, managed 15-member team, ~20,000 monthly visitors, active for 8+ years.

proj4.title: Just4Just
proj4.desc: Sleek, responsive web platform hosted on Netlify, built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Designed for seamless desktop and mobile experience with intuitive UI/UX.

proj5.title: Mousa Alobada Website
proj5.desc: Modern, responsive personal website deployed on Netlify. Clean UI/UX with performance-optimized front-end. Professional presentation tailored for real audience needs.

proj6.title: Al Shola School Website
proj6.desc: Full educational platform with school programs, fees, weekly plans, photo albums, location details, and a student helper tool. Deployed on Netlify.

cert2.name: Introduction to Greenhouse Gas Accounting for IT

edu1.field: Computer Science · Faculty of Computer and Information Technology
edu1.note: C++, Information Technology, Computer Science. Skills: Front-End Development, CSS, Web Development.

edu2.note: Computer Science track with strong performance in technical subjects.

edu3.note: Front-end development, CSS, and Computer Science skills developed during this period.

vol1.desc: Technical content creation, appearing in educational videos, proposing creative ideas, organizing and volunteering in technical events. Community engagement and outreach.
